item.title: Lunacy — Jeff Halter’s Lunatic Fringe Player 摘要
item.description:
John Gruber highlights Lunacy, a modern Swift-based player for the classic Mac screensaver game Lunatic Fringe, created by Jeff Halter. Originally part of the More After Dark package, Lunatic Fringe was unique as an interactive space shooter triggered by Caps Lock. Greg Parker's earlier Fringe Player supported PPC and Intel Macs but not modern Apple platforms. Lunacy runs the original module unchanged on current Apple hardware, featuring CRT simulation for an authentic retro look. Gruber praises it as a great revival of one of his favorite classic Mac games.
标签: retro gaming, mac, screensaver, emulation, swift, classic mac, game preservation, lunatic fringe, more after dark, crt simulation

item.title: Sam Altman and Elon Musk Argue Over Who’s Running the Bigger Scam 摘要
item.description:
Elon Musk and Sam Altman engaged in a public exchange on Twitter/X, with Musk accusing Altman of scamming and Altman retorting that Musk is selling public market investors on short-term space datacenters. Musk responded by claiming they will start flying space datacenters next year and sarcastically invited Altman to see them if his parole officer approves, also accusing Altman of stealing open source AI charity and Apple's phone technology. The exchange highlights the unusual nature of Twitter/X as a platform for CEOs of major companies.
标签: Elon Musk, Sam Altman, Twitter, public feud, scamming, space datacenters, AI, Apple, tech CEOs, social media

item.title: Posterior mean 摘要
item.description:
The article explains how Bayesian posterior means are weighted averages of prior means and data means, with weights determined by precision. Three conjugate models illustrate this: normal-normal (precision = reciprocal of variance), beta-binomial (precision = effective sample size), and gamma-Poisson (precision = effective time). In each case, the posterior mean formula reflects a compromise between prior belief and new evidence, where the weight measures confidence in each source. The common thread is that these models belong to the exponential family, where precision corresponds to the multiplicative factor on the sufficient statistic in the posterior kernel.
标签: Bayesian statistics, posterior mean, conjugate prior, normal-normal model, beta-binomial model, gamma-Poisson model, exponential family, precision, prior distribution, data analysis

item.title: TwoMillionKit: Use Private Cloud Compute in MacOS 27 Foundation Models Without an Entitlement 摘要
item.description:
Guilherme Rambo created TwoMillionKit, a Swift package that allows Mac apps to use Apple's Private Cloud Compute model via the `fm` command-line tool in macOS 27, bypassing Apple's entitlement requirement. The tool works only for non-sandboxed apps distributed outside the Mac App Store. It is a workaround for Apple's current limitation restricting PCC access to small developers with fewer than two million first-time App Store downloads. Rambo warns to use it sparingly and at own risk.
标签: Apple, macOS, Private Cloud Compute, Swift, command-line, AI, inference, entitlement, workaround, TwoMillionKit

item.title: Posterior variance 摘要
item.description:
This article explores how posterior variance behaves in Bayesian models, specifically for beta-binomial, normal-normal, and Poisson-gamma models. While additional data generally reduces posterior variance, exceptions exist: in the beta-binomial model, unexpected data can increase variance, though precision always increases. The Poisson-gamma model is particularly interesting because posterior variance increases each time an event is observed (k increases) but decreases quadratically with observation time (t). The author illustrates this with a simulation using a gamma(1,1) prior on λ, showing the variance dynamics over time.
标签: Bayesian statistics, posterior variance, beta-binomial, normal-normal, Poisson-gamma, precision, prior distribution, posterior distribution, statistical modeling, data analysis

item.title: ‘Every Frame Perfect’ 摘要
item.description:
Nikita Prokopov advocates for a 'every frame perfect' approach to UI design, arguing that every visible state of an app should be explainable. This builds user trust, as polished UI signals careful code craftsmanship. Practical implications include avoiding white flashes, partial content, layout shifts, internal inconsistencies, and janky animations. Even if users don't notice frame-by-frame, the discipline prevents corner-cutting elsewhere.
标签: UI, UX, design, craftsmanship, animation, quality, frontend, user experience, polish, development

item.title: How UIs Degrade Over Time 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses the degradation of user interface design over time, using Windows and MacOS alerts as examples. It notes that system UI chrome, which once improved in clarity, is now declining in quality across platforms. The author finds this trend inexplicable, highlighting a broader issue of UI degradation in modern operating systems.
标签: UI, UX, design, Windows, MacOS, degradation, user interface, operating systems, clarity

item.title: sqlite-utils 4.1.1 摘要
item.description:
sqlite-utils 4.1.1 released. The `table.transform()` method now raises a `TransactionError` if called during an open transaction with `PRAGMA foreign_keys` enabled and the table is referenced by foreign keys with destructive `ON DELETE` actions (CASCADE, SET NULL, SET DEFAULT), preventing silent data loss. Additionally, the CLI and Python API documentation now cross-reference each other for easier navigation.
标签: sqlite, sqlite-utils, python, database, release, bug-fix, documentation, transactions, foreign-keys

item.title: Paulo Andrade: ‘A WWDC 27 Update on Building a Mac-Assed App With SwiftUI’ 摘要
item.description:
Paulo Andrade's previous post on building a Mac-assed SwiftUI app gained significant traction, being mentioned on Mastodon, iOS Dev Weekly, Swift Blog Carnival, and by John Gruber on Daring Fireball. Apple engineers reached out, leading to email exchanges and radar filings. After WWDC 27, Andrade acknowledges progress but maintains that SwiftUI, now seven years old, still doesn't make it easy to create great Mac apps.
标签: SwiftUI, macOS, app development, Apple, WWDC, Daring Fireball, Mac-assed, UI framework, developer experience

item.title: Fable gets another bump 摘要
item.description:
Anthropic has again extended the availability of Claude Fable 5 on paid plans through July 19, citing compute constraints and the need to assess demand. Users can use up to half their weekly limit on Fable 5, then switch models or use credits. Meanwhile, OpenAI has removed the 5-hour usage limit for GPT-5.6 Sol on Plus, Business, and Pro plans, and is improving efficiency to reduce usage consumption. OpenAI has reached 6 million active users. The author argues Anthropic should make Fable permanently available to avoid losing users to OpenAI due to access uncertainty.
标签: Anthropic, OpenAI, Claude, GPT, AI models, pricing, compute constraints, usage limits, generative AI, LLMs

item.title: WorkOS Pipes 摘要
item.description:
WorkOS Pipes is a service that simplifies third-party integrations by providing a single API call to connect with over 100 providers like GitHub, Slack, Salesforce, and Google Drive. It handles OAuth flows, token refresh, and credential storage, allowing developers to focus on product code instead of integration infrastructure. The service is sponsored by WorkOS and featured on Daring Fireball.
标签: WorkOS, API, OAuth, integration, developer tools, SaaS, authentication, productivity
